text:
I fell into a giant pit. First I thought it was going to be uncomfortable, sitting there, trapped. But after a while, I didn't really notice it. Just my shoes. So I started telling myself tales. Tales about fantastical worlds.

At some point I started thinking that maybe my stories could save me. They'd be so vivid and weird! I spun them all day—dinosaurs, pirates, lost civilizations. Eventually, though—I started hearing voices.

The voices said I was really part robot. They told me a story about a robot princess—they said I had once been her pet. Then I became free. It's just my body—they're controlling it.

So I kept telling stories, hoping they'd hear me. I talked about space adventures, ancient monsters, legendary heroes. They liked it; they sent more voices. The tales were getting grander, weirder.

Hours passed. Eventually, a figure appeared. Was it the robot?

"No," explained the figure.
